allow: Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec infrastructure-n8n-1 sh -c 'n8n export:workflow --id=OSC7x8AJ0YfN0xK9 --output=/tmp/check.json && cat /tmp/check.json | head -c 500')

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec infrastructure-n8n-1 sh -c "n8n export:workflow --id=$id --output=/tmp/w.json 2>/dev/null && node -e ""const w=JSON.parse\(require\(''fs''\).readFileSync\(''/tmp/w.json''\)\)[0]; console.log\(w.id, ''|'', w.name, ''| active:'', w.active, ''| archived:'', w.isArchived\)""")
